zh.lifeSummary: 當Baldwin Wake於大約1145年出生在英國波藍德時，他的父親Hugh Wake45歲，母親Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare33歲。他於1175年與Agnes Du Hommet在英國戴文斯托克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1198年在英國林可爾史爾包恩享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baldwin Wake于大约1145年出生在英国波藍德时，他的父亲Hugh Wake45岁，母亲Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare33岁。他于1175年与Agnes Du Hommet在英国戴文斯托克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1198年在英国林可爾史爾包恩享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Baldwin Wake was born about 1145, in Cumberland, England, his father, Hugh Wake, was 45 and his mother, Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare, was 33. He married Agnes Du Hommet in 1175, in Stoke, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1198, in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baldwin Wake est né environ 1145, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Wake, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Du Hommet en 1175, à Stoke, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1198, à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baldwin Wake um 1145 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Wake 45 und seine Mutter Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare 33. Er hat 1175 in Stoke, Devon, England Agnes Du Hommet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1198 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baldwin Wake è nato il circa 1145 nel Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Hugh Wake, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Du Hommet nel 1175, nel Stoke, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1198, nel Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baldwin Wakeが約1145年にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Hugh Wakeは45歳，母Emma fitz Baldwin de Clareは33歳であった。1175年にイギリスデボンストクでAgnes Du Hommetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1198年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baldwin Wake(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Wake(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1175년 영국 데폰 스토크에서 Agnes Du Hommet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1198년 영국 링코실르 본에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Blisworth, Northamptonshire, England: Blisworth, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baldwin Wake nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Wake, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Du Hommet em 1175, em Stoke, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1198, em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baldwin Wake родился около 1145 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Wake было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Du Hommet в 1175 г. в местности сток, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1198 г. в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baldwin Wake nació aproximadamente 1145, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Wake, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Emma fitz Baldwin de Clare, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Agnes Du Hommet en 1175, en Stoke, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1198, en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
